_comment: Asset registry. Each entry: nombre, tipo (crypto|stock|stable|metal|etf|other), symbol (Binance ticker for auto-price; omit for manual), moneda_base (USDT|Bs|USD), target_pct (allocation target %), dca (true to track DCA), dca_meta_mensual_usd (monthly DCA target USD), precio_manual (override price if no symbol), news_query (custom Tavily query), skip_news (true to omit from report).
